title: 两条基本原则 / Two basic principles
point: 做产品推荐前的两条基本原则:只在客户确有需要时推荐;只推荐对其最合适的产品。 / Before any recommendation: only recommend products the client needs, and only those most suitable for his circumstances.
keyfacts: 需求导向销售流程确保产品贴合客户目标 / Needs-based sales process ensures fit to objectives
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.1

title: 良好产品知识 / Good product knowledge
point: 应熟悉产品系列、功能、性质、现金价值、红利、特别功能、利益支付、风险、费用、保障期、保费、不缴后果、14 天自由审视及体检限额。 / Know the range, function, nature, cash value, bonuses, features, benefit payout, risks, charges, cover duration, premium, non-payment effect, the 14-day free-look and medical limits.
keyfacts: 性质:分红/非分红/投连 / Participating, non-participating or ILP
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.3

title: 应急储蓄 / Emergency savings
point: 寻求其他投资工具前须先备妥应急储蓄;有固定收入者应至少备足 3 至 6 个月开支。 / Before sourcing other investment tools, set aside emergency savings; those with regular income should aim for at least 3 to 6 months' expenses.
keyfacts: 可用 T-Bills、SSB 等高流动性低风险工具 / Use T-Bills, SSBs (high liquidity, low risk)
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.6

title: Table 4.1 本金风险 / Capital risk in Table 4.1
point: 货币市场证券、终身寿险、储蓄险、年金=低风险;股票、衍生工具、房地产=高风险;债券与单位信托/ETF/投连=低至高。 / Money market, whole life, endowment, annuities = Low; equities, derivatives, property = High; bonds and unit trusts/ETFs/ILPs = Low to High.
keyfacts: 投连风险视底层资产而定 / ILP risk depends on underlying assets
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — Table 4.1

title: 保险即时资产 / Insurance creates an immediate estate
point: 保险最适合保障需求,因即使只缴一次保费,投保事件发生时也全额支付保额;储蓄等需时间累积,较不合适。 / Insurance best meets protection needs as it pays the full sum assured on the insured event even after one premium; savings take time to accumulate and are less suitable.
keyfacts: 55 岁或以上每 2-3 年检视保险计划 / Review plans every 2-3 years if aged 55+
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.7

title: MAS 建议保额 / MAS recommended coverage
point: MAS《基本财务规划指南》建议:身故及完全永久伤残取 9 倍年收入;标准危疾取 4 倍年收入。 / The Basic Financial Planning Guide recommends 9x annual income for death and TPD, and 4x annual income for standard critical illness.
keyfacts: TPD=完全永久伤残 / TPD = total permanent disability
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.8

title: 受养人保障计划 DPS / Dependants' Protection Scheme
point: DPS 为定期人寿计划,在身故、末期疾病或 TPD 时赔付(60 岁前最高 S$70,000;60 岁以上至 65 岁最高 S$55,000)。 / DPS is a term life scheme paying on death, terminal illness or TPD (up to S$70,000 until age 60; up to S$55,000 from above 60 to 65).
keyfacts: 21-65 岁公民及 PR 首次 CPF 工作缴款时自动延展 / Auto-extended to citizens/PRs aged 21-65 on first CPF working contribution
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.9

title: 附加险 Riders / Supplementary benefits
point: 附加险又称补充利益,是附加在基本保单上的特殊条款;常见有豁免保费、TPD、危疾、付款人利益、保证可保选项、意外身故等。 / Riders (supplementary benefits) are special provisions attached to a basic policy; common ones include Waiver of Premium, TPD, Critical Illness, Payor Benefit, Guaranteed Insurability Option and Accidental Death.
keyfacts: 以低成本提供基本保单之外的额外保障 / Add protection on the basic policy at low cost
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.10

title: 可负担性指引 / Affordability guide
point: 保险保障支出最多为收入(扣 CPF 后)的 15%(捆绑产品可超);至少 10% 用于退休及其他目标的投资。 / Spend at most 15% of income (after CPF) on insurance protection (bundled products may exceed); invest at least 10% for retirement and other goals.
keyfacts: 负担不起者会让保单失效,三方皆损 / Unaffordable premiums lead to lapses harming all parties
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.11

title: 风险承受与期限 / Risk tolerance and horizon
point: 风险厌恶且期限短→偏债券基金;风险偏好且期限长→偏股票/ILP;临近退休应避免高波动基金。 / Risk-averse with short horizon → bond-heavy fund; risk-seeker with long horizon → equity-heavy/ILP; avoid high-volatility funds near retirement.
keyfacts: 非分红计划保证,客户不承担投资风险 / Non-participating plans are guaranteed; no investment risk to client
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.14-2.17

title: 需求排序 / Prioritisation
point: 客户无法同时负担所有需求时应帮其排序;有受养人时保障需求优先;暂不可负担永久保障可用 Convertible Term。 / When the client cannot afford all needs, help prioritise; where there are dependants, protection needs come first; use a Convertible Term policy if permanent cover is not yet affordable.
keyfacts: 排序无硬性规则,客户可能更了解自身目标 / No hard and fast rules; the client may know his objectives best
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.18-2.21

title: 遗产/传承规划 / Estate / legacy planning
point: 规划领域含四工具:遗嘱、CPF 提名、持久授权书(LPA)、预先护理计划(ACP)。 / Planning areas include four tools: a will, a CPF nomination, a Lasting Power of Attorney (LPA) and an Advance Care Plan (ACP).
keyfacts: LPA 在丧失心智能力时授权他人代为决策 / LPA appoints others to decide on loss of mental capacity
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.23-2.25
